evals.prompt: Run the pre-demo validation for Citizens Bank. The demo is tomorrow morning.
evals.expected_output: citizens-bank-demo-checklist.md organized by timing (day-before / morning-of / 30-min-before), citizens-bank-risks.md with open risks. Go/no-go decision based on available pipeline outputs.
assertions: Checklist is organized into timing sections (day before, morning of, 30 min before)
Each checklist item has a specific command or UI action, not a vague instruction
ELSER warm-up step is present and correctly timed (before audience arrives)
Agent scenario testing is in the checklist (all three scenarios from the script)
Risks section identifies at least one risk with a documented fallback
Go/no-go status is explicit and has named decision owner
Missing pipeline outputs (data model not yet run) are noted, not silently skipped

evals.prompt: Validate the Lowe's demo. Everything should be built — I want a full go/no-go.
evals.expected_output: lowes-demo-checklist.md with all 6 scenes covered, ML verification steps for swimlane, simulator running check, all agent scenarios tested. Go recommendation if all checks pass.
assertions: Live data simulator check is present (event count incrementing in Discover)
ML swimlane verification step specifies store 1842 and anomaly_score >= 75
ELSER warm-up step present with specific query and expected response time
All three agent scenarios listed with specific pass criteria
Dashboard drill-down warm-up step present (geo heatmap tile pre-load)
Browser tab pre-opening list matches the scenes in the script
Screenshot fallbacks section exists with specific fallback plan
